data.title: Chinese Tech Giants Alibaba and JD.com Urge Central Bank Approval for Yuan-Based Stablecoins
data.description:
Chinese tech giants JD. com and Alibaba affiliate Ant Group are pressuring the People's Bank of China to authorize yuan-based stablecoins, proposing to launch offshore yuan tokens in Hong Kong to counter the U. S. dollar's dominance in the $247 billion global stablecoin market
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/chinese-tech-giants-alibaba-and-jd-com-urge-central-bank-approval-for-yuan-based-stablecoins/

data.title: Binance Launches Institutional Loans With Up to 4x Leverage, Zero Interest Offers
data.description:
Binance has unveiled Institutional Loans, a new cross-collateralized credit line offering verified corporate clients up to 4x leverage.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/binance-launches-institutional-loans-with-up-to-4x-leverage-zero-interest-offers/

data.title: British listed company Cel AI spent about $678,000 to buy about 6.18 bitcoins
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Cel AI, a British listed company, announced that as part of its ongoing asset reserve diversification strategy, it purchased 6.1794767 bitcoins at an average price of $109,791.00 per bitcoin, with a total investment of $678,450.93.
Earlier news, Cel AI, a British listed company, has raised 10 million pounds to purchase Bitcoin.

data.title: PBOC Aims at Expanding Financial Opening in Shanghai
data.description:
PBOC announces financial opening steps in Shanghai FTZ, enhancing digital RMB utilization while deepening international ties.
source: https://coincu.com/346762-pboc-shanghai-financial-opening

data.title: Binance Appoints Gillian Lynch as Head of Europe and UK to Advance Strategic Expansion and Compliance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance announced the appointment of former Gemini Europe CEO Gillian Lynch as its head of Europe and the UK, who will lead strategic expansion and regulatory cooperation. Lynch has more than 20 years of experience in financial technology, banking and crypto assets, and has served as a senior executive at Gemini, Bank of Ireland and Leveris. Binance said that this move demonstrates its commitment to promoting compliance development, strengthening user protection, and leading the mature development of the European crypto market under policy environments such as MiCA.

data.title: ETH/BTC bull James Fickel deposits 80,000 ETH worth over $200 million to Coinbase Prime
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember Monitoring, the well-known ETH/BTC exchange rate bull James Fickel has just transferred a total of 80,000 ETH (about 204 million US dollars) to Coinbase Prime and its custody address. Among them, 30,000 ETH (about 76.45 million US dollars) were transferred to the main account, and 50,000 ETH (about 127 million US dollars) were transferred to the custody address. Last year, he lost about 20,632 ETH due to long ETH/BTC exchange rate, and has not operated for nearly half a year.

data.title: BTFS Network Advances Decentralization with Key Governance Proposals
data.description: According to Odaily, BitTorrent has announced that three critical governance proposals for the BTFS network, BTIP-89, BTIP-90, and BTIP-91, have reached their final implementation stage. BTIP-91 establishes a decentralized governance framework based on smart contracts, while BTIP-90 enables transparent on-chain management of file metadata. Additionally, BTIP-89 introduces a mechanism for professional storage service providers (SPs). This upgrade is expected to significantly enhance the network's transparency, reliability, and community autonomy, marking a crucial step towards a fully decentralized storage infrastructure.

data.title: Hong Kong Subsidiaries of Public Funds Prepare for Stablecoin Integration
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, some Hong Kong subsidiaries of public funds are actively preparing for stablecoin integration within their ecosystems. Among these, China Asset Management Co., Ltd. (Hua Xia Fund) is participating in a stablecoin sandbox test, which includes aspects such as issuance, payment, asset connection, and fund redemption.

Hua Xia Fund has stated its intention to continue launching more tokenized fund products. The company aims to facilitate secondary circulation of tokenized funds on compliant trading platforms and explore the use of digital currencies, such as stablecoins and digital Hong Kong dollars, for settlement. This initiative is expected to enhance the efficiency of on-chain fund transactions.

data.title: A new wallet injected $4.16 million USDC into HyperLiquid and went long on HYPE with 10x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet deposited $4.16 million USDC to the HyperLiquid platform and opened a HYPE long position with 10x leverage.

data.title: OKX Wallet exclusively launches RCADE Network airdrop query and token TGE activities
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, OKX Wallet has opened an exclusive RCADE Network airdrop query. Users can query the airdrop quota through OKX Wallet before TGE on July 9, 2025. In addition, OKX Wallet users can also complete verification on the OKX Wallet TGE Express before 17:00 (UTC+8) on July 5, 2025. After passing the verification, they will have priority to participate in RACDE TGE. The event will be launched on the FjordFoundry platform at 22:00 (UTC+8) on July 7.
OKX Wallet is the world's leading Web3 portal, covering 130+ mainstream public chains and widely serving 50 million users worldwide, providing them with a one-stop on-chain exploration experience including wallets, DEX, and NFT markets. RCADE Network is a game ecosystem based on Abritrum. Investors include Pantera Capital, Animoca, Rockstar founder Dan Houser, etc.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Transfers 1,000 ETH to Internal Address
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Ethereum Foundation's development team has transferred 1,000 ETH, valued at approximately $2.55 million, to an internal address identified as 0xc061...0B6d. This address currently holds 16,000 ETH, with an estimated value of $40.8 million.

data.title: China Asset Management: We will continue to launch more tokenized fund products in the future and promote the secondary circulation of tokenized funds on compliant platforms
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: China Asset Management participated in the stablecoin sandbox test, covering the issuance, payment, asset docking and fund redemption of stablecoins. China Asset Management said that it will continue to launch more tokenized fund products in the future, promote the secondary circulation of tokenized funds on compliant trading platforms, explore the use of digital currencies such as stablecoins and digital Hong Kong dollars for settlement, and optimize the efficiency of on-chain fund transactions. (Financial World)

data.title: Binance Launches 11th Project on BNSOL Super Stake with Pixels (PIXEL)
data.description: Binance announced the 11th project on BNSOL Super Stake with Pixels (PIXEL), a social casual web3 game powered by the Ronin Network.From July 7, 2025 00:00 (UTC) to August 7, 2025 23:59 (UTC), users who do the following will receive PIXEL APR Boost Airdrop Rewards:Binance Account - Hold BNSOL or stake SOL into BNSOL; orBinance Wallet - Hold any of the DeFi BNSOL Assets: BNSOL, sBNSOL, bzSOLThe PIXEL APR Boost Airdrop Rewards are additional token airdrops given on top of the base APR from Binance SOL Staking, providing an extra boost of higher APR to users’ earnings.

data.title: Here’s Why Bitcoin’s Price Doesn’t go up Despite Massive ETF and Corporate Buys
data.description:
Bitcoin whales sold 500K BTC ($50B) in a year, matching ETF inflows as institutions now hold 25% of BTC supply.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/heres-why-bitcoins-price-doesnt-go-up-despite-massive-etf-and-corporate-buys/

data.title: Satoshi-era Bitcoin address moves 10,000 BTC worth $1 billion after 14 years
data.description:
A long-dormant Bitcoin wallet dating back to the early days of the cryptocurrency has just moved 10,000 BTC, worth approximately $1.
source: https://finbold.com/satoshi-era-bitcoin-address-moves-10000-btc-worth-1-billion-after-14-years/

data.title: Central Bank: Increase efforts to replicate and promote the "Shanghai Experience" and support the promotion of innovative applications of digital RMB to relevant free trade pilot zones
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ji Min, head of the Research Bureau of the People's Bank of China, said at the regular policy briefing of the State Council on July 4 that in the next step, the People's Bank of China will work with relevant departments and other financial management departments to continue to support the free trade pilot zone to deepen the connection with international high-standard economic and trade rules and promote higher-level institutional opening on the basis of effectively preventing risks. On the one hand, further deepen financial openness and innovation in the Shanghai Free Trade Pilot Zone. Not long ago, eight support policies were announced at the Lujiazui Forum, including the development of free trade offshore bonds, the optimization and upgrading of free trade account functions, and the pilot of comprehensive reform of offshore trade financial services. On the other hand, we must increase the replication and promotion of the "Shanghai Experience", support the promotion of innovative applications of digital RMB and other measures to relevant free trade pilot zones, and promote measures such as optimizing electronic payment services to the whole country, explore practical paths for the open and innovative development of my country's financial sector, and accumulate more replicable and popularizable experience. (China Net)
